# arifOS MCP — Production Constitutional AI Runtime

> Layer: L3 BODY | arifosmcp.arif-fazil.com
> Version: v2026.03.24
> Author: Muhammad Arif bin Fazil
> Status: OPERATIONAL

## MCP Endpoint

URL: https://arifosmcp.arif-fazil.com/mcp
Transport: Streamable HTTP (SSE deprecated as of MCP spec March 2025)
Auth: Optional X-API-Key header (set COPILOT_API_KEY env to enable)
Health: https://arifosmcp.arif-fazil.com/health

## STDIO (Local)

python -m arifosmcp.runtime stdio

Claude Desktop config:
{
  "mcpServers": {
    "arifos": {
      "command": "python",
      "args": ["-m", "arifosmcp.runtime", "stdio"]
    }
  }
}

## HTTP (Remote)

python -m arifosmcp.runtime http
# or via Docker:
docker run -p 8080:8080 arifos/arifosmcp:latest

## 11 Mega-Tools

init_anchor          000_INIT     — Deep Identity & MODEL_SOUL Verification (V2)
arifOS_kernel        444_ROUTER   — Full 000→999 pipeline
agi_mind             111/222      — Reasoning and synthesis
asi_heart            555_EMPATHY  — Empathy assessment, red-teaming
apex_soul            777/888      — Final verdict, constitutional score
vault_ledger         999_VAULT    — Immutable ZKPC ledger
physics_reality      333_EXPLORE  — Qdrant + web reality search
engineering_memory   555_MEMORY   — Long-term cross-session memory
math_estimator       222_THINK    — Entropy budgets, quantitative reasoning
code_engine          333_EXPLORE  — Sandboxed Python execution
architect_registry   000_INIT     — System topology and architecture

## Governance

All calls pass through 13 constitutional floors. High-stakes actions
return 888_HOLD and require human confirmation (F13 Sovereign).

Verdicts: SEAL (pass) | SABAR (wait) | VOID (reject) | 888_HOLD (human needed)

## A2A

Agent card: https://arifosmcp.arif-fazil.com/.well-known/agent.json
A2A endpoint: https://arifosmcp.arif-fazil.com/a2a
